name: saagar-bcc-android
description: Saagar Traders — Business Control Centre (V5), packaged as a fully offline Android app with SQLite-primary storage + daily auto-backup. NOTE: the authoritative build identity is the in-app constants APP_VERSION / APK_BUILD in www/index.html — this npm version is just the build wrapper and is not published.

scripts.postinstall: echo Dependencies installed. Next: npm run add:android
scripts.build:apk: cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.build:release: cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
